title: New Update Info Screen 🚀
message: We've added a brand new way to keep you informed about all the latest features and improvements directly inside the app.
points: Introduced an interactive in-app update dialog
Easily track what's new and improved in every release
Under-the-hood stability and UI performance enhancements
